metadata.title: Format Automatically with Prettier
metadata.description: Format Automatically with Prettier Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: log
ast.source: loading prettier-format
ast.target: 正在加载 prettier-format

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format file automatically when you save
ast.target: 保存时自动格式化文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of spaces a tab character will render as.
ast.target: 一个制表符将显示为的空格数。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Format on save
ast.target: 保存时格式化

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Indent using tabs
ast.target: 使用制表符缩进

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Indent visual width
ast.target: 缩进显示宽度

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print spaces between brackets.
ast.target: 在括号之间打印空格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to wrap object literals.
ast.target: 对象字面量的换行方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep as multi-line, if there is a newline between the opening brace and first property.
ast.target: 如果左花括号与第一个属性之间有换行，则保持多行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fit to a single line when possible.
ast.target: 尽可能放在一行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use single quotes instead of double quotes.
ast.target: 使用单引号代替双引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to wrap prose.
ast.target: 如何换行文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap prose if it exceeds the print width.
ast.target: 当文本超过打印宽度时换行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Do not wrap prose.
ast.target: 不换行文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap prose as-is.
ast.target: 按原样换行文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Put > of opening tags on the last line instead of on a new line.
ast.target: 将起始标签的 > 放在最后一行，而不是新行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enforce single attribute per line in HTML, Vue and JSX.
ast.target: 在 HTML、Vue 和 JSX 中强制每行一个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print (to stderr) where a cursor at the given position would move to after formatting.
ast.target: 输出（到 stderr）在给定位置的光标格式化后会移动到的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which end of line characters to apply.
ast.target: 要应用的行尾字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Line Feed only (\n), common on Linux and macOS as well as inside git repos
ast.target: 仅使用换行符（\n），在 Linux 和 macOS 以及 git 仓库中常见

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return + Line Feed characters (\r\n), common on Windows
ast.target: 回车 + 换行字符（\r\n），在 Windows 上常见

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return character only (\r), used very rarely
ast.target: 仅回车字符（\r），极少使用

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Maintain existing
(mixed values within one file are normalised by looking at what's used after the first line)
ast.target:
保持现有
（同一文件中的混合值会通过查看第一行之后所使用的内容进行规范化）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specify the input filepath. This will be used to do parser inference.
ast.target: 指定输入文件路径。这将用于推断解析器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Insert @format pragma into file's first docblock comment.
ast.target: 将 @format pragma 插入到文件的第一个 docblock 注释中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which parser to use.
ast.target: 使用哪个解析器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: JSON with Comments
ast.target: 带注释的 JSON

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lightning Web Components
ast.target: Lightning Web 组件

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a plugin. Multiple plugins can be passed as separate `--plugin`s.
ast.target: 添加插件。可通过多个独立的 `--plugin` 传入多个插件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The line length where Prettier will try wrap.
ast.target: Prettier 尝试换行的行长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Require either '@prettier' or '@format' to be present in the file's first docblock comment
in order for it to be formatted.
ast.target:
需要在文件的第一个 docblock 注释中包含 '@prettier' 或 '@format'
才能进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of spaces per indentation level.
ast.target: 每个缩进级别的空格数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent with tabs instead of spaces.
ast.target: 使用制表符缩进而非空格。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Format current file
ast.target: 格式化当前文件

ast.name: title
ast.source: an array of the following values
ast.target: 以下值的数组

ast.name: title
ast.source: one of the following values
ast.target: 以下值之一
